Two papers accepted and a new paper on ArXiv

One paper got accepted in Scientific Reports and one in Gesundheitswesen

Two papers I was involved on just got accepted Combining Graph Neural Networks and Spatio-temporal Disease Models to Predict COVID-19 Cases in Germany with David Rügamer and Emilio Dorigatti was just accepted in Scientific Reports. The paper is in press but already available on ArXiv. Additionally, a paper written in german was accepted in Das Gesundheutswesen (similarily the article is only available in press but will soon be online). Finally, a new working paper is out on ArXiv about modelling large bipartite networks (see this link).

Updated: March 07, 2022
